popularStory.headline: History of Christina de Brus (1278-1357)
popularStory.description: Christina Bruce (c. 1278 – 1356/1357), also known as Christina de Brus, was a daughter of Marjorie, Countess of Carrick, and her husband, Robert de Brus, jure uxoris Earl of Carrick, as well as a sist …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Christina De Brus於大約1250年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克時，她的父親Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale8歲，母親Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick-3歲。她於1301年與Sir Christopher Seton of Seton在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1357年在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林享年108歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Christina De Brus于大约1250年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克时，她的父亲Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale8岁，母亲Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick-3岁。她于1301年与Sir Christopher Seton of Seton在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1357年在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林享年108岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Christina De Brus was born about 1250, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, was 8 and her mother, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, was -3. She married Sir Christopher Seton of Seton in 1301, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1357, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 108, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Christina De Brus est née environ 1250, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, avait 8 ans et sa mère, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, avait -3 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Christopher Seton of Seton en 1301, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1357, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 108 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Christina De Brus um 1250 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale 8 und ihre Mutter Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick -3. Sie hat 1301 in Scotland Sir Christopher Seton of Seton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1357 im Alter von 108 Jahren in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christina De Brus è nata il circa 1250 nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, aveva 8 anni e sua madre, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, aveva -3 anni. Lei sposato Sir Christopher Seton of Seton nel 1301, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1357, nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 108 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Christina De Brusが約1250年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックで生まれた時，父Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandaleは8歳，母Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrickは-3歳であった。1301年にスコットランドでSir Christopher Seton of Setonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1357年にイギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで108歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Christina De Brus(이)가 대략 1250년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale(은)는 8세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick(은)는 -3세였다. 그녀는 1301년 스컷랜드에서 Sir Christopher Seton of Seton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1357년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 108세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christina De Brus nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, tinha 8 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, tinha -3 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Christopher Seton of Seton em 1301, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1357, em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 108 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Christina De Brus родилась около 1250 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, -3. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Christopher Seton of Seton в 1301 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1357 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 108 лет и была похоронена в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Christina De Brus nació aproximadamente 1250, en Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, tenía 8 años y su mamá, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, tenía -3 años. Se casó con Sir Christopher Seton of Seton en 1301, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1357, en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 108 años, y fue sepultada en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
